assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can run Python and pip locally.
The developer meets Cerebras minimum-age requirements stated in the Website Terms of Use.
No Cerebras account, API key, payment method, or chat-completion request exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Cerebras API key and complete a cURL chat-completions call.

first_success.outcome: POST https://api.cerebras.ai/v1/chat/completions with a Bearer key returns a chat-completion message.
first_success.observable_signal: Assistant content answering the quickstart prompt is present.

route_selection.surface: Cerebras Cloud Console plus official Inference Quickstart Python SDK
route_selection.rule: Use the Cloud Console self-service path named by the Quickstart; do not treat partner marketplaces as the primary account-creation route.

candidates.name: Cloud Console signup, create API key, Python SDK first request
candidates.reason: Quickstart only says sign up or log in; the public console does not expose a static registration field contract.

candidates.name: Partner access via AWS Marketplace, OpenRouter, Hugging Face, or Vercel
candidates.reason: Pricing page lists these as alternate access paths with different account and billing boundaries.

required_path.action: Sign up or log in through the Cerebras Cloud Console.

required_fields.label: Cloud Console signup fields and agreements
required_fields.notes: Official docs do not enumerate registration controls.

required_path.observable_result: The developer has an authenticated Cloud Console session.

required_path.action: Open API Keys, create a key, and copy it.
required_path.observable_result: An API key value is available to export as CEREBRAS_API_KEY.

required_path.action: Run the published chat.completions.create example and print the message content.
required_path.observable_result: The terminal prints the chat-completion content.

required_path.action: POST https://api.cerebras.ai/v1/chat/completions with Authorization Bearer and confirm completion text.

prerequisites.description: Local Python and pip are available for the Quickstart SDK install.

external_gates.description: Website Terms of Use apply through access or use and include minimum-age and accuracy requirements.

platform_outcomes.description: Cerebras returns a chat completion for the Quickstart model and messages.
Pricing states $5 in free credits after making an account for the Free Trial tier.

excluded.reason: Quickstart presents playground as an optional alternate for users already familiar with LLM APIs.
Only required if free-trial limits are insufficient; not established as mandatory for first success.

excluded.item: Installing the Cerebras Python or Node SDK
excluded.reason: Quickstart documents an equivalent cURL call and states SDK install is optional.

sources.title: Quickstart
evidence_supported: Sign up or log in via Cloud Console

sources.title: API Keys
evidence_supported: API key management destination referenced by Quickstart

sources.title: Pricing
evidence_supported: $5 free credits after making an account

sources.title: Cloud Console
evidence_supported: Public console entry for signup or login

sources.title: Terms of Service
evidence_supported: Website Terms of Use apply to access or use

uncertainties.question: What fields, authentication alternatives, agreements, verification actions, and submission states appear in current Cerebras Cloud signup?
uncertainties.impact: The required account path cannot be reconstructed or counted from public documentation alone.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough of cloud.cerebras.ai registration through first authenticated API Keys access.

uncertainties.question: Does the $5 free-credit Free Trial require a payment method before the first Inference request succeeds?
uncertainties.impact: A hidden billing gate would add payment fields and change lexicographic route comparison against paid tiers.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official Free Trial prerequisites or a cold-account observation of whether the first chat completion works with zero payment method on file.
